title: Cisco IOS-XE — IPsec site-to-site tunnel with IKEv1

source.description: Site-to-site IPsec VPN with IKEv1 policy, pre-shared key, transform-set, crypto map, and tunnel interface

config.description: IKEv1 site-to-site IPsec with AES256-SHA, pre-shared key authentication, crypto map bound to outside interface, and tunnel interface for overlay
known_issues: IKEv1 deprecation; IKEv2 preferred in modern deployments

expected_translation.high_level: Huawei VRP equivalent with ike proposal, pre-shared-key, ipsec proposal, ipsec policy, and tunnel interface

verification.notes: High-risk: IPsec + ACL. Complex feature requiring manual review of SA parameters, crypto profiles, and ACL-to-policy mapping
